environment: Domain layer must remain pure (no infrastructure imports).
Use Result<T> pattern instead of thrown exceptions.
Follow testing pyramid: L1 ~50%, L2 ~30%, L3 ~20%.

PreToolUse.description: Force delegation: block the MAIN agent from implementing pattern files directly (must delegate to a subagent / /orchestrate). Subagents pass through (detected via PreToolUse agent_id). Threshold = pattern files only (lib/pattern-routing.js). Soften via DELEGATION_MODE=warn, disable via DELEGATION_MODE=off, one-off bypass via .delegation-ok-sentinel.

PostToolUse.description: TypeScript type check after editing .ts/.tsx files
Validate DDD base classes (Aggregate, VO, Entity, Spec)
Warn when task files are missing ## Security Considerations section

Stop.description: Detect cross-context imports in modified files

SubagentStop.description: Pattern-grounding gate: block a subagent from finishing if it edited a pattern file (aggregate/handler/repo/…) without reading that pattern in its OWN transcript. Closes the gap PreToolUse can't see. Soften via PATTERN_READS_MODE=warn, disable via off.
